query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A person stands facing the camera on a ground covered with scattered leaves and small debris, wearing a leather jacket, dark pants, and a scarf, with a light source positioned directly behind their head creating a bright halo around their hair and shoulders and casting a long, narrow shadow forward across the ground toward the bottom of the frame. The surrounding background is entirely black, rendering the environment invisible beyond the illuminated patch of ground around the figure's feet. The image is monochromatic.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person stands on leaf-strewn ground in a monochromatic image characterized by heavy film grain and analog texture. Extreme underexposure crushes the entire background into an oppressive black void, leaving only a harsh rim light outlining the subject's head and shoulders and an elongated shadow stretching toward the viewer. The coarse grain, stark contrast, and suffocating darkness create an atmosphere of dread and isolation.
